title.en: Fruit Ripening — Chlorophyll Out, Lycopene In
title.ko: 과일 익음 — 엽록소 out, 리코펜 in

subtitle.en: a green tomato decays chlorophyll while synthesising lycopene; ethylene-driven biochemistry shifts the colour from chlorophyll-green to lycopene-red in a few days
subtitle.ko: 녹색 토마토가 엽록소 분해 + 리코펜 합성 — 에틸렌 구동, 며칠 사이 적색 전환

description.en: Tomato colour sweeps green → yellow → red as day advances. Two coupled pigment trajectories driven by ethylene cascade.
description.ko: 토마토 색이 일자에 따라 녹→황→적. 에틸렌 cascade로 두 색소 trajectory 결합.
